name: My boss is mad I filed hearing loss claim, can they fire me?

mainEntity.name: My boss is mad I filed hearing loss claim, can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation for workers' comp filing violates laws in Utah and Idaho; protected activity.** Document threats; file retaliation charge with Labor Commission.[3] Seek unemployment if terminated. Courts award backpay, reinstatement. Report immediately to preserve rights.[4] Common in high-risk industries.
